benchmarks.conversion_rate: 1–3% is average; > 4% is strong for direct-to-consumer
benchmarks.cart_abandonment_rate: Industry average is ~70% — target < 60% with recovery flows
benchmarks.aov: Varies by category; benchmark against your own cohorts quarter-over-quarter
benchmarks.email_cart_recovery_rate: 10–15% of abandoned carts recovered via email sequence

best_practices: Optimize the checkout funnel — every additional step reduces conversion ~10%
Show trust signals at checkout (security badges, return policy, reviews)
Offer guest checkout — requiring account creation kills ~35% of conversions
Use product recommendations (frequently bought together, recently viewed)
Display inventory scarcity truthfully ('Only 3 left') to reduce abandonment
Mobile checkout must be one-thumb operable — Apple Pay / Google Pay reduce friction
Post-purchase email sequence: confirmation → shipping → delivery → review request
common_risks: Inventory management failures causing overselling or stockouts
Payment fraud — especially on new or high-AOV products
Return fraud — wardrobing, empty box returns, receipt fraud
Shipping partner failures damaging brand reputation
Counterfeit reviews inflating or deflating product scores
GDPR/CCPA exposure from marketing pixel retargeting without consent
Supply chain concentration risk — single manufacturer or supplier
growth_patterns: SEO on product pages — long-tail product searches have high purchase intent
Paid social (Meta, TikTok) for new customer acquisition
Email/SMS marketing for repeat purchase retention
Subscription or replenishment model for consumables (reduces CAC on repeat orders)
Influencer and UGC (user-generated content) for social proof
Bundle and upsell at checkout to increase AOV
Referral program — 'Give $10, get $10' for word-of-mouth growth

product_page: Multiple high-quality images (3+ angles, zoom enabled)
Size guide or fit predictor to reduce returns
Reviews with photos visible above the fold
Prominent Add to Cart button with inventory level
checkout: Address auto-complete to reduce form friction
Multiple payment methods (card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal)
No surprise fees — show all costs before final confirmation

recommended_integrations: Stripe — payment processing, fraud protection, subscriptions
Shopify — if building on top of an existing store platform
Algolia — product search with typo tolerance and filters
Klaviyo — email and SMS marketing automation for DTC ecommerce
Cloudinary — product image processing, CDN, and transformation
Postmark / Resend — transactional emails (order confirmation, shipping updates)
Loop Returns — returns and exchanges management
